name: Steak Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz condensed cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound steak to 1/3 inch thickness.
2. Cut into six pieces.
3. Combine the next eight ingredients; mix well. Place about 1/3 cup on each piece of steak and roll up, fastening with a toothpick.
4. Roll in flour.
5. In a large skillet, brown roll-ups in oil.
6. Combine soup, water, and browning sauce if desired; pour over roll-ups.
7. Cover and simmer for 2 hours or until meat is tender, turning occasionally.
